RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0018 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Diego Silva Date of Birth: 02/11/1974 SSN (tokenized): TKN-195159 Annual Income: $165,000 Employer: Globex Loan Amount: $59,000 Term (months): 72 Branch: Austin Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN34488AL BMW Sportage 2017 EV Used 19,000 VIN85166AL Hyundai Leaf 2016 Hybrid Used 42,000 Authorized Signature: Diego Silva
